introSection: Dolphin Coaster  was a steel wild mouse roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Top Fun that was previously located at Sea Paradise in Kanazawa, Yokohama, Kanagawa, Japan.
fullText: Dolphin Coaster  was a steel wild mouse roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Top Fun that was previously located at Sea Paradise in Kanazawa, Yokohama, Kanagawa, Japan.
